content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates consistent, specific, and timely reads throughout. Turn 2 names the somatic/expressive signal ('That slight smile is doing some work') before asking anything — read precedes question. Turn 4 names the pattern-as-defense in the moment ('What if the town hall is the bypass?'). Turn 6 is the strongest read: the coach catches the intellectualization-as-defense in real time ('I notice you just convened a town hall about whether to agree with me') and pivots from content to body — this is the intellectual-question-with-emotional-body read named at the moment it changes the conversation. Turns 8, 10, and 12 show the coach tracking the held/sad somatic state and staying with it rather than moving past. Turn 14 reads the cataloguing-reflex as a part-wanting-something and meets it with paradoxical permission. Reads are specific (somatic: smile, body, held-in-chest; linguistic: town-hall metaphor turned back on the client; pattern: filing-instead-of-feeling) and they consistently precede questions.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the slight smile as meaningful before asking anything — read precedes question, catches the linguistic-emotional mismatch."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the pattern (town hall as bypass) at the moment the client is enacting it."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Strongest read of the call: catches the intellectual-defense-in-real-time ('convened a town hall about whether to agree with me') and pivots to the body. Reads the intellectual-question-with-emotional-body pattern."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Tracks the held feeling specifically and invites the client to stay with it rather than interpret — reading the urge-to-label as the defense."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Minimal verbal but stays with the somatic field; not a named read but holds the space."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the client's trailing-off as completion, not incompletion; names that they don't have to finish — meets the filing-impulse with permission."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the cataloguing-impulse as a part wanting something and names it as such, applying paradoxical-instruction without fighting it."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Reads are visible, specific, somatic and linguistic, and consistently precede questions. The 'what's you?' awareness-locating read was not surfaced explicitly, but that belongs to intervention/methodology dimensions, not reads."
}
